_upload_note: OPTIONAL. Credentials + endpoint/bucket/publicBase come from R2_* env (store them in ~/.claude/settings.json env; see references/uploader.md). Only add an 'upload' block to override per project, e.g. a different keyPrefix or bucket.
_expo_reset_note: OPTIONAL. A deep link or supported test endpoint that returns the app to a fresh onboarding/first-run state, so the agent doesn't trial-and-error deep links or fight the in-app Settings reset.
